column1: keyboard layout handling is implemented in full OS firmware and Dvorak references point to menu strings plus layout tables
previous HID-focused hypothesis for alphaword layout switching was the wrong layer
layout selection uses the Dvorak-related strings plus a logical-key remap table in full OS
layout selector byte is 0x5d36 and value 3 is the default QWERTY pass-through mode
internal layout values 0,1,2 map to the three alternate layouts and likely correspond to Dvorak/Left/Right in UI order
Direct stock Calculator launch context is sufficient to validate keyboard interaction in headless mode
Real SmartApplets boot plus chooser navigation is the reliable acceptance path for validating stock Calculator in headless mode
Headless --type-at drops shifted printable symbols because matrix_key_for_char only maps unshifted keys
Custom OCR atlas applet would be the best path for precise LCD OCR
The emulator can reconstruct applet LCD text more precisely by capturing A-line text traps than by bitmap OCR
Stock Calculator REPL printable input should use the firmware display-table character mapping rather than the HID/logical matrix mapping
Headless type-at/type-now drops some printable Calculator input because it uses the short tap_char pulse instead of the debug tap profile
Exact Czech top-row shifted-digit behavior is impossible with the current single logical remap table
Forth Mini exported package stale relative to source before rebuild
AlphaWord has a later key-to-character stage beyond the documented logical remap table
Firmware contains separate character lookup tables after the layout/key stage
Forth Mini modal on_focus keyboard loop is fighting the full OS applet input path; restoring event-driven Char/Key callbacks should fix live REPL behavior
Physical raw key 0x5c is the AlphaWord text-entry path for the stock '1' key
Table 0x44c288 indexed by logical 0x38 is not the direct AlphaWord unshifted typing table for stock '1'
AlphaWord printable char delivery uses low RAM bytes 0x433/0x434/0x435 rather than reading 0x44c288 directly at send time
Ordinary printable chars reach AlphaWord through 0x434eb4/0x434eb8..0x434ee8 -> 0x417d00 -> 0x417acc
Shifted key-event dispatch uses 0x4183a6..0x4183ae -> 0x418754..0x41878a -> 0x417ae6, separate from the printable-char send path
Shifted printable chars rejoin the ordinary printable pipeline via 0x435a20..0x435a5a before 0x434eb8..0x434ee8
Forth Mini full-system runs may still be loading stale applet state via recovery seed
Forth Mini full-system runs may still be loading stale applet state via recovery seed
Forth Mini modal loop receives raw-key prompt input correctly in full-system headless mode
Forth Mini rows 1-3 can render fixed text in full-system headless mode
Forth Mini composed transcript rows lose bytes after the first command byte during line-buffer composition
Dynamic transcript-line composition in applet memory should be replaced by segmented row drawing
Fresh full-system build->reinit still leaves Forth Mini blank after Enter
Switching Forth Mini back to event-driven on_char/on_key with plain transcript rows fixes the live blank screen
Current live failure is not caused by stale exported applet package or stale recovery seed
Forth Mini full-system callback sequence on real menu launch includes SetFocus followed by repeated message-0 callbacks
Full-system Enter for Forth Mini is delivered as a Key (0x21) callback
Full-system Enter for Forth Mini is delivered as a Char (0x20) callback with param 0x0d
Current Forth Mini drops full-system Enter because on_char ignores 0x0d and on_key never receives it
Forth Mini live line truncation is caused by by-value line copies in draw()
Forth Mini live line truncation is specific to the success-transcript path after evaluation
Patching the generic 0x434f14 printable-byte writer will affect non-keyboard firmware text paths too
Guarding the 0x434f14 hook only on RAM byte 0x423 is sufficient to limit translation to typed keyboard input
The current Czech patcher regression is caused by the late printable-char hook path replacing the device-proven layout-table remap
Building the transcript row in a local buffer before copying it into transcript_3 fixes the live truncation
Forth Mini enter() is not executing in the live full-system path
Forth Mini live stack state updates correctly after Enter, but runtime line initialization leaves transcript buffers zero-filled
Forth Mini input_len is already corrupted before Enter in the live full-system path
Restoring the documented A5 + 0x300 REPL placement fixes the live Forth Mini transcript truncation
Volatile byte access for line buffers fixes the live Forth Mini transcript truncation
Forth Mini local command_len remains stable across eval in the live full-system path
Forth Mini local command_len is corrupted across eval before transcript rendering in the live full-system path
Remaining live Forth Mini bug is caused by '.' not reaching the applet input path
Typed '.' words reach Forth Mini through the live full-system path, but success-transcript assembly after output words is still corrupted
Forth Mini live output-word corruption starts at integer rendering in write_i32
Forth Mini live '.s' rendering is now correct; the remaining live output bug is specific to '.' pending-output state
The live AlphaWord key-to-char translator for the seeded typing path is 0x423c7c and not the older 0x434eea/0x4252f6 path
A Czech full-layout patch should hook inside 0x423c7c after 0x423d7a remap so it can stay layout-slot-specific
The modifier word in d7 at 0x423c7c contains enough shift-state information to generate full Czech ASCII pairs
The . command bug is caused by pending_output_kind not preserving the popped value across later tokens on the same input line
Persisting the popped value in REPL state fixes the dot command transcript bug without regressing existing Forth Mini unit behavior
The new Czech 0x423c7c hook survives a normal boot with the existing recovery seed
The new Czech 0x423c7c hook itself is invalid and crashes even on a clean boot
The observed address error is caused by interaction with the stale recovery seed rather than the patched OS code path itself
The Czech hook crashes because the trampoline overwrote only 8 bytes and split the original move.w 0x20(a7),d7 instruction
The second Czech hook crash is caused by using jsr at the function entry, which leaves an extra internal return address on the stack for the override rts path
The live prompt-line bug is caused by ordinary typing arriving through on_key while current Forth Mini only redraws on on_char
The current Czech hook build survives a seeded emulator boot for at least 15,000,000 steps without exception
Restoring printable and backspace handling on on_key without reclaiming Enter fixes the live prompt-line path without regressing existing tests
In the menu-launched emulator path, prompt text disappears because a later callback after keypress repaints without the current input line
Patching the startup fallback at 0x423ba2 from layout 3 to the replaced slot should keep Czech active across restart instead of falling back to QWERTY
Forth Mini prompt rendering uses the SDK text-trap display path, so an empty emulator text_screen means the draw callback did not run rather than an OCR blind spot
Alpha GUI root UI does not fill native window, so only the occupied content rect is painted and the rest remains black
Alpha GUI content is clipped by explicit viewport max/min sizing instead of root UI fill
Alpha GUI black area is caused by OS/window compositor outside the app, not egui layout
